ordered_lines.text: Hello Eniine, I provide access to [Useful Items and Customizations] which can be purchased with [Ultimate Credits].
If you have received an [Ultimate Credit Token] you may hand it to me and I will give you your credits.
Your current Ultimate Credit balance is: 50
I offer the many items & services in exchange for [Ultimate Credits]. To view my wares select from one of the following categories:
I have the following clickies for sale:
13. Godly Bottle of Condensed Jenkins [Info & Purchase]
You bestow the following buffs on your target (Unlimited Charges):
This can be used to change the apperance of your primary and secondary weapon and/or shield to any known & working model in the game!
This can be used to change your race to any known/working race in the game!
This can be used to summon your entire group to your feet.
Summon all static raid or boss mobs within Ultimate, Avatar, Demigod, and God zones. God Expeditions and the current top raid zone do not apply.
This can be used to shrink all pets, even swarms, within 75 yards!
This can be used to summon a banker anywhere in the world.
This can be used to summon a resupply vendor anywhere in the world.
This can be used to summon Jeeves (Zone Translocator) anywhere in the world.
This can be used to summon Bart (Vendor) anywhere in the world.
This can be used to summon Cutie (Guild Hall Translocator) anywhere in the world.
You bestow all God Tier buffs on your target. This can only be used on characters level 75 or greater.
You cast Malosanin (Targeted AoE Malosani) on all targets within range of your current target, reducing all of their resists by 250.
Hello Eniine, I provide access to [Useful Items and Customizations] which can be purchased with [Ultimate Credits].
If you have received an [Ultimate Credit Token] you may hand it to me and I will give you your credits.
Your current Ultimate Credit balance is: 50
I offer the many items & services in exchange for [Ultimate Credits]. To view my wares select from one of the following categories:
Use this to instantly boost your progression flags to Ultimate Ocean of Tears. It will also grant you the appropriate Charm.
Use this to summon your Epic 1.0 and Epic 1.0 augment.
Use this to instantly level to 70.
Use this to instantly boost your progression flags to Ultimate Sebilis. It will also grant you the appropriate Charm.
This item is used in Ultimate Weapon forging.
This item is used in Ultimate Weapon forging.
This item is used in Ultimate Avatar Armor forging.
This item is used in Vulakian Armor crafting (Ultimate Temple of Veeshan).
This item is used in Rallosian Armor crafting (Ultimate Kael Drakkel).
This item is used in the Ultimate Weasel the Dread summoning ritual in Unrest.

I offer the many items & services in exchange for [Ultimate Credits]. To view my wares select from one of the following categories:
I have the following currency transfer items for sale:
Right clicking this will convert 10 of your Ultimate Credits into a tradable item. When consuming the created item the user will gain 10 Ultimate Credits.
Right clicking this will convert 100 of your Tier 3 Credits into a tradable item. When consuming the created item the user will gain 100 Tier 3 credits.
